mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.wr_daily (employee_no, report_date, done_today, plan_tomorrow, issue, mood, hours_worked, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{employeeNo}, CAST(#{reportDate} AS DATE), #{doneToday}, #{planTomorrow}, #{issue}, #{mood}, #{hoursWorked}, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (employee_no, report_date) DO UPDATE SET done_today = EXCLUDED.done_today, plan_tomorrow = EXCLUDED.plan_tomorrow, issue = EXCLUDED.issue, mood = EXCLUDED.mood, hours_worked = EXCLUDED.hours_worked, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT report_id, employee_no, report_date, done_today, plan_tomorrow, issue, mood, hours_worked, created_at, updated_at FROM platform_v3.wr_daily WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo} AND report_date = CAST(#{reportDate} AS DATE)

SELECT report_id, employee_no, report_date, done_today, plan_tomorrow, issue, mood, hours_worked, created_at, updated_at FROM platform_v3.wr_daily WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo} AND report_date BETWEEN CAST(#{weekStart} AS DATE) AND CAST(#{weekStart} AS DATE) + INTERVAL '6 day' ORDER BY report_date

SELECT report_id, employee_no, report_date, done_today, plan_tomorrow, issue, mood, hours_worked, created_at, updated_at FROM platform_v3.wr_daily WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo} AND TO_CHAR(report_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{yearMonth} ORDER BY report_date

SELECT e.employee_no, e.employee_name, e.dept_id, w.report_id, w.report_date, w.done_today, w.plan_tomorrow, w.issue, w.mood, w.hours_worked, w.updated_at FROM platform_v3.org_employee e LEFT JOIN platform_v3.wr_daily w ON w.employee_no = e.employee_no AND w.report_date = CAST(#{reportDate} AS DATE) WHERE e.dept_id = #{deptId} AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY e.employee_name

SELECT e.employee_no, e.employee_name, e.dept_id, w.report_id, w.report_date, w.done_today, w.plan_tomorrow, w.issue, w.mood, w.hours_worked, w.updated_at FROM platform_v3.org_employee e LEFT JOIN platform_v3.wr_daily w ON w.employee_no = e.employee_no AND w.report_date BETWEEN CAST(#{weekStart} AS DATE) AND CAST(#{weekStart} AS DATE) + INTERVAL '6 day' WHERE e.dept_id = #{deptId} AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY e.employee_name, w.report_date
